thoughts_srccacheredisadapterts_14045386.content: ioredis throws at import time when the package is not installed, which naturally triggers the fallback mechanism rather than a runtime error later.

facts_srccachecachemanagerts_14045400395.content: Dynamic import defers the import-time throw, allowing the cacheManager to catch the error and fall back gracefully instead of crashing the process.

conventions_srccache_1404541364141.content: Cache adapters follow an interface pattern: a shared CacheAdapter interface in cacheAdapter.ts, with concrete implementations (redisAdapter, memoryAdapter) in separate files.

facts_srccachecachemanagerts_14045427560.content: Using Result<T, E> from src/utils/result.ts for typed error handling lets the cache manager distinguish recoverable errors from fatal ones.

facts_pipelinedecompose_1404544089351.content: Sub-task failures during decompose abort the current path and fall back to runPipeline(), completing the pipeline via the normal route rather than crashing.
